research.title: EV Choice Experiment in Vietnam
research.sample: n = 212 young consumers in Hanoi and Ho Chi Minh City
research.model: Discrete choice experiment with MNL, mixed logit, and 2-class latent class estimation

key_metrics.label: sample_size
key_metrics.source_note: Final analytic sample after quality exclusions

key_metrics.label: segment_split
key_metrics.source_note: Two-class latent class solution (Table 3 basis)

key_metrics.label: model_fit_loglikelihood
key_metrics.source_note: Best-fitting reported 2-class latent class model

key_metrics.label: scenario_bundle_wtp
key_metrics.source_note: Segment-specific scenario translation from reported MWTP values

research.card_summary: Reported (self-reported): EV choice experiment with n = 212 maps design, range, price, and charging trade-offs across pragmatic and aesthetic consumer segments in Vietnam.

research.title: Influencer Retention, Engagement, and Brand Transfer on UGC Platforms
research.sample: n = 565 active UGC users in Vietnam

key_metrics.source_note: Abstract reports antecedents explain 55% of engagement variance

key_metrics.source_note: Abstract reports engagement accounts for 70% of retention variance

research.card_summary: Reported (self-reported): Four-E UGC retention model linking engagement quality, brand equity, and return intent.

research.title: Buffet Menu Nudging and Choice Architecture
research.model: 2x3 between-subjects experiment + ordinal logistic tier-choice model with mediation

key_metrics.source_note: Study 1 t-test comparison of intended calorie intake

key_metrics.label: study_2_calorie_delta
key_metrics.source_note: Study 2 manipulation check

key_metrics.source_note: Premium-tier choice share by menu order in Study 2

key_metrics.label: higher_tier_odds
key_metrics.source_note: Ordinal logistic estimate for healthier-first menu condition

key_metrics.label: mediation_effect
key_metrics.source_note: Bootstrapped indirect effect via perceived value

research.card_summary: Reported (self-reported): Healthier-first menu sequencing reduced intended calories and shifted choice toward lower-priced buffet bundles.
